Alright, so this is how your customer can place an order for themselves. They can do it one of two ways. You can either send them your affiliate URL link here, or once you set up your team members, your team members will have their own URL link as well. Under the team member sections, we haven't sent anyone up yet, but once you do, they will have their own refer link that you can see right here. They can send them that as well. The team member refer link will tie it back to the team member that I was ordering under. That way you can pay them out commissions and then it will tie back to you as the affiliate. So for this one, we're just going to use the affiliate URL. I'm just going to place it in here and I'll log out of the account so it shows exactly what they would see. So you would send them this refer link. Either they would think it already have an account or they would have to create an account, but when you send them this link, it will bring them to the order page here where they can either view products or whatever they want. They will see the same options that you do. They can pick the flavor. They can pick the months, the three, six, twelve months. They can pick subscribe and save or just a one-time purchase. They can add it to the cart. View cart. They also have the applied coupon. If they have a coupon code, anything like that. And then when they hit proceed to checkout, it will prompt them here. If they already have an account, they just log in. And if they need to register, if they have never ordered through proceed jobs before, once they're prompted here, it will just have them create their own account here. So I already have an account. So I'll just log in. That way you can see it has all of the same info. If they already have an account, it will save their account info on file with their address and all of that. If they don't, it will just have to fill in all of their information and it will save it for the future. And then they just hit place order and that is it.
